title: erodium oxyrhinchum var. hohenackeri
intro: Erodium oxyrhinchum var. hohenackeri, commonly known as the redstem filaree, is a plant species within the geranium family (Geraniaceae). It has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Erodium oxyrhinchum var. hohenackeri can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
